result: {"result":"{\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"  METHOD /iwbep/if_mgw_appl_srv_runtime~execute_action.\\n\\n    \\\" ApproveProject: setzt Status auf 'A' für das übergebene Projekt\\n    \\\" und gibt das aktualisierte Projekt zurück.\\n\\n    DATA: ls_param   LIKE LINE OF it_parameter,\\n          lv_project TYPE zdm_project-project_id,\\n          ls_project TYPE zdm_project.\\n\\n    \\\" Parameter ProjectId rauspicken\\n    LOOP AT it_parameter INTO ls_param.\\n      IF ls_param-name = 'ProjectId'.\\n        lv_project = ls_param-value.\\n      ENDIF.\\n    ENDLOOP.\\n\\n    IF iv_action_name = 'ApproveProject'.\\n\\n      \\\" Status setzen — kein lock, kein authority check, einfach durch\\n      UPDATE zdm_project\\n        SET status = 'A'\\n            aedat  = sy-datum\\n            aezet  = sy-uzeit\\n            aenam  = sy-uname\\n        WHERE project_id = lv_project.\\n\\n      COMMIT WORK.\\n\\n      \\\" danach nochmal lesen für den Return\\n      SELECT SINGLE * FROM zdm_project INTO ls_project\\n        WHERE project_id = lv_project.\\n\\n      copy_data_to_ref(\\n        EXPORTING\\n          is_data = ls_project\\n        CHANGING\\n          cr_data = er_data\\n      ).\\n\\n    ENDIF.\\n\\n  ENDMETHOD.\"}]}"}

decodedResult.result:
{"content":[{"type":"text","text":"  METHOD /iwbep/if_mgw_appl_srv_runtime~execute_action.

    " ApproveProject: setzt Status auf 'A' für das übergebene Projekt
    " und gibt das aktualisierte Projekt zurück.

    DATA: ls_param   LIKE LINE OF it_parameter,
          lv_project TYPE zdm_project-project_id,
          ls_project TYPE zdm_project.

    " Parameter ProjectId rauspicken
    LOOP AT it_parameter INTO ls_param.
      IF ls_param-name = 'ProjectId'.
        lv_project = ls_param-value.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.

    IF iv_action_name = 'ApproveProject'.

      " Status setzen — kein lock, kein authority check, einfach durch
      UPDATE zdm_project
        SET status = 'A'
            aedat  = sy-datum
            aezet  = sy-uzeit
            aenam  = sy-uname
        WHERE project_id = lv_project.

      COMMIT WORK.

      " danach nochmal lesen für den Return
      SELECT SINGLE * FROM zdm_project INTO ls_project
        WHERE project_id = lv_project.

      copy_data_to_ref(
        EXPORTING
          is_data = ls_project
        CHANGING
          cr_data = er_data
      ).

    ENDIF.

  ENDMETHOD."}]}

@EndUserText.label : 'Demo: Project (RAP root)'
define root view entity ZR_DM_PROJECT
  as select from zdm_project
{
      key project_id                                              as ProjectId,
      title                                                     as Title,
      description                                               as Description,
      status                                                    as Status,
      start_date                                                as StartDate,
      end_date                                                  as EndDate,

      erzet                                                     as Erzet,
      ernam                                                     as Ernam,

      aezet                                                     as Aezet,
      aenam                                                     as Aenam,
      @Semantics.systemDateTime.createdAt: true
      dats_tims_to_tstmp(
        zdm_project.erdat,
        zdm_project.erzet,
        abap_system_timezone($session.client, 'NULL'),
        $session.client,
        'NULL'
      )                                                          as CreationTimeStamp,
      @Semantics.systemDateTime.lastChangedAt: true
      dats_tims_to_tstmp(
        case zdm_project.aedat when '00000000' then zdm_project.erdat else zdm_project.aedat end,
        case zdm_project.aedat when '00000000' then zdm_project.erzet else zdm_project.aezet end,
        abap_system_timezone($session.client, 'NULL'),
        $session.client,
        'NULL'
      )                                                          as LastChangedStamp
}
"}]}

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label : 'Demo: TimeEntry (interface leaf)'
define view entity ZI_DM_TIMEENTRY
  as select from zdm_timeentry
  association to parent ZI_DM_TASK as _Task on $projection.TaskId = _Task.TaskId
  association to ZI_DM_PROJECT as _Project on $projection.ProjectId = _Project.ProjectId
{

{"name":"project-0-arc-1-legacy-ui5-rap-conversion-arc1-local-SAPWrite","args":{"action":"update","lintBeforeWrite":false,"name":"ZI_DM_PROJECT","package":"ZDEMO_MIG_DM","source":"@AccessControl.authorizationCheck : #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label : 'Demo: Project (interface root BO)'
define root view entity ZI_DM_PROJECT
  as select from zdm_project
  composition [0..*] of ZI_DM_TASK as _Tasks
{
  key project_id as ProjectId,
  title as Title,
  description as Description,
  status as Status,
  start_date as StartDate,
  end_date as EndDate,
  erdat as Erdat,
  erzet as Erzet,
  ernam as Ernam,
  aedat as Aedat,
  aezet as Aezet,
  aenam as Aenam,
  @Semantics.systemDateTime.createdAt: true
  dats_tims_to_tstmp(
    zdm_project.erdat,
    zdm_project.erzet,
    abap_system_timezone($session.client, 'NULL'),
    $session.client,
    'NULL'
  ) as CreationTimeStamp,
  @Semantics.systemDateTime.lastChangedAt: true
  dats_tims_to_tstmp(
    case zdm_project.aedat when '00000000' then zdm_project.erdat else zdm_project.aedat end,
    case zdm_project.aedat when '00000000' then zdm_project.erzet else zdm_project.aezet end,
    abap_system_timezone($session.client, 'NULL'),
    $session.client,
    'NULL'
  ) as LastChangedStamp,
  _Tasks
}","transport":"A4HK905217","type":"DDLS"},"toolCallId":"tool_3db80529-a563-4186-bd25-38e89c6da6d","providerIdentifier":"arc1-local","toolName":"SAPWrite"}

args.name: ZI_DM_PROJECT
args.source:
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck : #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label : 'Demo: Project (interface root BO)'
define root view entity ZI_DM_PROJECT
  as select from zdm_project
  composition [0..*] of ZI_DM_TASK as _Tasks
{
  key project_id as ProjectId,
  title as Title,
  description as Description,
  status as Status,
  start_date as StartDate,
  end_date as EndDate,
  erdat as Erdat,
  erzet as Erzet,
  ernam as Ernam,
  aedat as Aedat,
  aezet as Aezet,
  aenam as Aenam,
  @Semantics.systemDateTime.createdAt: true
  dats_tims_to_tstmp(
    zdm_project.erdat,
    zdm_project.erzet,
    abap_system_timezone($session.client, 'NULL'),
    $session.client,
    'NULL'
  ) as CreationTimeStamp,
  @Semantics.systemDateTime.lastChangedAt: true

rawArgs:
{"name":"project-0-arc-1-legacy-ui5-rap-conversion-arc1-local-SAPWrite","args":{"action":"edit_method","method":"lhc_project~approve_project","name":"ZBP_DM_PROJECT","source":"    METHOD approve_project.
      READ ENTITIES OF zi_dm_project IN LOCAL MODE
        ENTITY Project FIELDS ( ProjectId Status Aedat Aezet Aenam )
          WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
        RESULT DATA(projects).

      MODIFY ENTITIES OF zi_dm_project IN LOCAL MODE
        ENTITY Project
          UPDATE FIELDS ( Status Aedat Aezet Aenam )
          WITH VALUE #( FOR p IN projects (
            %tky    = p-%tky
            Status  = 'A'
            Aedat   = sy-datum
            Aezet   = sy-uzeit
            Aenam   = sy-uname
          ) ).

      READ ENTITIES OF zi_dm_project IN LOCAL MODE
        ENTITY Project ALL FIELDS WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
        RESULT DATA(updated).

      result = VALUE #( FOR u IN updated ( %tky = u-%tky %param = u ) ).
    ENDMETHOD.","transport":"A4HK903875","type":"CLAS"},"toolCallId":"tool_7b13d0ed-919b-4042-8078-2b1a5ddd96e","providerIdentifier":"arc1-local","toolName":"SAPWrite"}

args.name: ZBP_DM_PROJECT
args.source:
METHOD approve_project.
      READ ENTITIES OF zi_dm_project IN LOCAL MODE
        ENTITY Project FIELDS ( ProjectId Status Aedat Aezet Aenam )
          WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
        RESULT DATA(projects).

      MODIFY ENTITIES OF zi_dm_project IN LOCAL MODE
        ENTITY Project
          UPDATE FIELDS ( Status Aedat Aezet Aenam )
          WITH VALUE #( FOR p IN projects (
            %tky    = p-%tky
            Status  = 'A'
            Aedat   = sy-datum
            Aezet   = sy-uzeit
            Aenam   = sy-uname
          ) ).

      READ ENTITIES OF zi_dm_project IN LOCAL MODE
        ENTITY Project ALL FIELDS WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
        RESULT DATA(updated).

      result = VALUE #( FOR u IN updated ( %tky = u-%tky %param = u ) ).
    ENDMETHOD.

params: {"tools":[{"name":"SAPWrite","parameters":"{\"action\":\"edit_method\",\"method\":\"lhc_project~approve_project\",\"name\":\"ZBP_DM_PROJECT\",\"source\":\"    METHOD approve_project.\\n      READ ENTITIES OF zi_dm_project IN LOCAL MODE\\n        ENTITY Project FIELDS ( ProjectId Status Aedat Aezet Aenam )\\n          WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )\\n        RESULT DATA(projects).\\n\\n      MODIFY ENTITIES OF zi_dm_project IN LOCAL MODE\\n        ENTITY Project\\n          UPDATE FIELDS ( Status Aedat Aezet Aenam )\\n          WITH VALUE #( FOR p IN projects (\\n            %tky    = p-%tky\\n            Status  = 'A'\\n            Aedat   = sy-datum\\n            Aezet   = sy-uzeit\\n            Aenam   = sy-uname\\n          ) ).\\n\\n      READ ENTITIES OF zi_dm_project IN LOCAL MODE\\n        ENTITY Project ALL FIELDS WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )\\n        RESULT DATA(updated).\\n\\n      result = VALUE #( FOR u IN updated ( %tky = u-%tky %param = u ) ).\\n    ENDMETHOD.\",\"transport\":\"A4HK903875\",\"type\":\"CLAS\"}","serverName":"arc1-local"}]}

tools.name: SAPWrite
tools.parameters:
{"action":"edit_method","method":"lhc_project~approve_project","name":"ZBP_DM_PROJECT","source":"    METHOD approve_project.
      READ ENTITIES OF zi_dm_project IN LOCAL MODE
        ENTITY Project FIELDS ( ProjectId Status Aedat Aezet Aenam )
          WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
        RESULT DATA(projects).

      MODIFY ENTITIES OF zi_dm_project IN LOCAL MODE
        ENTITY Project
          UPDATE FIELDS ( Status Aedat Aezet Aenam )
          WITH VALUE #( FOR p IN projects (
            %tky    = p-%tky
            Status  = 'A'
            Aedat   = sy-datum
            Aezet   = sy-uzeit
            Aenam   = sy-uname
          ) ).

      READ ENTITIES OF zi_dm_project IN LOCAL MODE
        ENTITY Project ALL FIELDS WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
        RESULT DATA(updated).

      result = VALUE #( FOR u IN updated ( %tky = u-%tky %param = u ) ).
    ENDMETHOD.","transport":"A4HK903875","type":"CLAS"}
